name: Mermaid ER Diagram — Clinical Database Schema
input: Create an ER diagram for a clinical database: Patient has many Visits, Visit belongs to one Patient and one Physician, Physician has many Visits, Visit has many Lab Results, Patient has many Prescriptions, Prescription references one Drug.
qualityCriteria: No placeholder or lorem ipsum content
napkinBenchmark: Entity-relationship diagram with cardinality notations and entity attributes.

data.caption: Clinical database entity-relationship schema
